description: A caesar salad built around fresh produce, dressing, and contrasting textures for a light but flavorful plate.
preparation_steps: Prepare and season the main produce

health_advice.benefits: Can provide freshness, fiber, and a lighter eating option with good flavor contrast.
health_advice.risks: Heavy dressings, cheese, or fried add-ons can raise sodium, fat, and calories quickly.
health_advice.healthy_tip: Lean toward fresh produce, lighter dressings, and balanced add-ons when possible.

dietary_notes.note: Dressings, cheese, or protein add-ons can change the final profile
